member.name: M:BankAppAPI.Controllers.AuthController.Login(BankAppAPI.Dtos.LoginDto)
member.summary: Authenticates a user, generates a JWT token.

member.name: M:BankAppAPI.Controllers.AuthController.Register(BankAppAPI.Dtos.RegisterDto)
member.summary: Registers a new customer with user/bank account and disposition.

member.name: M:BankAppAPI.Controllers.AuthController.IssueLoan(BankAppAPI.Dtos.IssueLoanDto)
member.summary: Issues a new loan to a customer.

member.name: M:BankAppAPI.Controllers.AuthController.UpdateUser(System.String,BankAppAPI.Dtos.UpdateUserDto)
member.summary: Updates an existing user's email and/or password.

member.name: M:BankAppAPI.Controllers.AuthController.GetUser(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves a user's basic information including their role.

member.name: M:BankAppAPI.Controllers.AuthController.GetUserByEmail(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves a user's basic information by email.

member.name: M:BankAppAPI.Controllers.AuthController.GetCustomerWithAccounts(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves customer information with accounts, loans, and transactions.

member.name: M:BankAppAPI.Controllers.CustomerAccountsController.#ctor(BankAppAPI.Data.BankAppDataContext)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the CustomerAccountsController.
member.param: The database context for bank application data.

member.name: M:BankAppAPI.Controllers.CustomerAccountsController.GetMyAccounts
member.summary: Retrieves all bank accounts for customer.
member.returns: An object containing customer information, total account count, total balance, and a list of all accounts with their details.

member.name: M:BankAppAPI.Controllers.CustomerAccountsController.GetAccountTransactions(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves all transactions for a specific account.
member.param: The ID of the account to retrieve transactions for.
The number of transactions per page (default is 20).
member.returns: Customer account details along with paginated list of transactions.

member.name: M:BankAppAPI.Controllers.CustomerAccountsController.GetAccountDetails(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves detailed information for a specific account.
member.param: The ID of the account to retrieve details for.
member.returns: Fetches detailed account information including account type, balance, disposition type. Also includes total transactions, active loans, and recent transactions.

member.name: M:BankAppAPI.Controllers.CustomerAccountsController.CreateAccount(BankAppAPI.Dtos.CreateAccountDto)
member.summary: Creates a new bank account.
member.remarks: Creates a new account and links it to the customer as the owner with zero initial balance. Also uses a transaction to ensure data consistency.

member.name: M:BankAppAPI.Controllers.CustomerAccountsController.TransferMoney(BankAppAPI.Dtos.TransferDto)
member.summary: Transfers money between bank accounts.
member.remarks: Endpoint that creates two transaction records: a debit for the source account and a credit for the destination account. The destination account does not need to be owned by the authenticated customer. The response indicates whether the transfer is the same customer or a different customer.

member.name: M:BankAppAPI.Controllers.CustomerAccountsController.GetAvailableAccountTypes
member.summary: Retrieves all available account types offered.
member.returns: A list of all account types with their IDs, names, and descriptions.
member.remarks: Endpoint that requires authentication but does not require a specific role. It provides information about bank acount types.

members.member: Password for the new user account.

member.name: T:BankAppAPI.Services.AuthService
member.summary: Service implementation for authentication and user management operations.

member.name: T:BankAppAPI.Services.IAuthService
member.summary: Service interface for authentication and user management operations.

member.name: M:BankAppAPI.Services.IAuthService.LoginAsync(BankAppAPI.Dtos.LoginDto)
member.summary: Authenticates a user and generates a JWT token.

member.name: M:BankAppAPI.Services.IAuthService.RegisterCustomerAsync(BankAppAPI.Dtos.RegisterDto)
member.summary: Registers a new customer with user account and disposition.

member.name: M:BankAppAPI.Services.IAuthService.IssueLoanAsync(BankAppAPI.Dtos.IssueLoanDto)
member.summary: Issues a new loan to a customer and credits their account.

member.name: M:BankAppAPI.Services.IAuthService.UpdateUserAsync(System.String,BankAppAPI.Dtos.UpdateUserDto)
member.summary: Updates an existing user's email and/or password.

member.name: M:BankAppAPI.Services.IAuthService.GetUserByIdAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves a user's information by user ID.

member.name: M:BankAppAPI.Services.IAuthService.GetUserByEmailAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves a user's information by email address.

member.name: M:BankAppAPI.Services.IAuthService.GetCustomerWithAccountsAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves complete customer information with accounts, loans, and transactions.

member.name: T:Program
member.summary: Auto-generated public partial Program class for top-level statement apps.

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Type)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a type. Example: T:Namespace.Outer+Inner`1 becomes T:Namespace.Outer.Inner`1

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Reflection.PropertyInfo)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a property. Example: P:Namespace.ContainingType.PropertyName or for an indexer P:Namespace.ContainingType.Item(System.Int32)

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Type,System.String)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a property given its container type and property name. Example: P:Namespace.ContainingType.PropertyName

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Reflection.MethodInfo)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a method (or constructor). For example: M:Namespace.ContainingType.MethodName(ParamType1,ParamType2)~ReturnType M:Namespace.ContainingType.#ctor(ParamType)

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.GetTypeDocId(System.Type,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Generates a documentation ID string for a type. This method handles nested types (replacing '+' with '.'), generic types, arrays, pointers, by-ref types, and generic parameters. The flag controls whether constructed generic type arguments are emitted, while controls whether the generic arity marker (e.g. "`1") is appended.

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.NormalizeDocId(System.String)
member.summary: Normalizes a documentation comment ID to match the compiler-style format. Strips the return type suffix for ordinary methods but retains it for conversion operators.
member.param: The documentation comment ID to normalize.
